author: Codex Tomogatchi Contributors
description: A DW1-sized, source-backed branching pack with 61 forms and 24 real three-stage paths from the open-source Tuxemon evolution graph. Sprites are local concept atlases, not copied Tuxemon art.

name: Tuxemon Open 61

source.license: GPL-3.0-or-later for source data in the Tuxemon repository
source.name: Tuxemon
source.notes: Tuxemon currently provides 47 real three-stage paths across 128 unique basic/stage1/stage2 monsters in the checked source. This pack chooses 61 unique forms to match the commonly cited Digimon World 1 playable count.
